name: python3-backoff
title: python3-backoff
summary: Function decoration for backoff and retry
description:
Function decoration for backoff and retry
This module provides function decorators which can be used to wrap a
function such that it will be retried until some condition is met. It
is meant to be of use when accessing unreliable resources with the
potential for intermittent failures i.e. network resources and external
APIs. Somewhat more generally, it may also be of use for dynamically
polling resources for externally generated content.
.
Decorators support both regular functions for synchronous code and
asyncio's coroutines for asynchronous code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-backoff because Function decoration for backoff and retry.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-backoff as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-backoff with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-backoff --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
